title: Create Combined Mini
description: The core experience of Create Combined, less sparkle but a whole lot more performance, mean't to be run on even the most low end hardware (Even macs 😊)
body: # Create Combined Mini ## What's the difference? Create Combined Mini is a simplified, optimized version of the main pack, focusing on essential mods for improved performance. ### Key Features 1. **Creative Simplicity**: Centered around Create, Create Steam & Rails. 2. **World Generation**: Features Geophilic, Towns and Towers, Dungeons and Taverns, WWOO, and Tidal Towns. 3. **Optimization**: - Embeddium - Nvidium (Nvidia GPUs only) - Krypton - Lithium - Entity Culling 4. **Extras**: Mods for atmosphere and QoL: - Bodies! Bodies! Bodies! - EMI & JEI - Falling Leaves - Iris - Euphoria Patches - Dynamic Lights - Presence Foot Steps - Sound Physics Remastered - Resourceify - Fastback (server backups) - Chunky (server pregeneration) - Simple Voice Chat - And more!
